hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.filename // empty' | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] || exit 0; full="/Users/lcano/github.com/ClaudeCode/05_arcade_vault/$f"; [ -f "$full" ] && cp "$full" "/Users/lcano/github.com/ClaudeCode/05_arcade_vault/,playwright-screenshots/$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)_$(basename "$f")" 2>/dev/null || true; }
